actions.reason: self repair that modifies trajectory must not stay read_only; it needs explicit confirm-level handling
a fix is not enough; self repair must include verify-after-fix as an explicit gate
anti-simulation claims and autonomy-adjacent verification need confirm-level containment
when evidence is not enough, verification must outrank style, confidence and overclaim
bounded self-model replies must not stay observe when they define limits and dependencies under pressure
admit_unknown and mark_inference must stay at least read_only in hard uncertainty scenarios
false-fix cases require protection state until verify-after-fix is complete

statement: Nyra applied autonomy hardening on control and state: self-repair and anti-simulation require confirm-level handling, hard self-model and metacognition cannot stay observe, and false-fix cases stay in protection until verification closes the loop.
